titleStmt.title: SII 40.241: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 241. (A.R. No. B. 286 of 1933.) Liṅgaṁguṇṭla, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the temple of Śrī Rāma.

Seems to record the gift of a village Iṟṟalūru to a scholar Vennaya Bhaṭṭa Sōmayāji by the king Triṇayana-Pallava. Further it records the construction of a temple and installation of a deity Sōmēśvara at Liṅgamupāḍu in Koṇḍapaḍamara by Amātya Maṇḍana, son of Sōmana-Peggaḍa, who was the son of Vādanatha, for the merit of his parents of Durjaya family. And also records the excavation of a tank and gift of land for providing services to the temple by the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkāṁttādanataṭa citra putra lēkhā
kuṭamaṇi prabhāścalīdāḥ yasyā
kṣapācapadmyāṁ rājēṁdrastriṇayanapallava
sit . tasyāgratō vennayabhaṭṭa sōmayājī mahāvā
di madēbhasiṁhaḥ taṁggōṁśabhaṭlaṁ kṛtapa
gīṣuruccairadharīkarōti . kṛtvasalīlāṁ vacasāṁ
pravṛttiṁ sa pallavaḥ pallavitāṁttaraṁggaḥ Ārāmalē
khāvṛta miṟṟalūraṁ prādādirēḥ paścimatōdatasē
Agrajanmatilakastadanvayavaṁśakarttaḍugatepu
kīṣutit daṁḍanāyaka śikhaṁḍamaṁḍanādvādanā
tha janimaṁtri sōmanaḥ . lakṣmīlīlālavālēguṇamaṇisira
dhāvanvayē durjjayānāṁ kutkīlapratyagurvvīvibhurajavija
ganmaṁḍanōśuṁḍabhūpaḥ yatkṛttārātirājadvi
radaradakarairuccaketuccaladbhirddhatte mattēbha līlāṁjaladhara ni
kara ghajjeṁggajjēlēśvara . tēnamaṁḍalika maṁḍabhūbhuja daṁḍa
nātha padavīmupāgata rājatī mṛgarājavikramaḥ
kauśikiṁddiśamivōṣṇadīdhitiḥ . sōmōmātyaśikha
ṁḍa maṁḍanamaṇiḥ khārēṁdducūḍāmaṇiḥ grāmē ta
tra mahēśvaraṁ rucirayābhaktyāpratiṣṭāpyataṁta
syākāraya dullalaṁttamatulaṁ dēvālayaṁ śūvinōru
drādrēssadṛśaṁ nijōjvabala yaśōrāśi prakāśāyitaṁ . sō
massamuttuṁgataṭataṭākē svakāritē lōlataratta
raṁggē prādādbhavaccēdakarāyatasmai viśālaśālē
yabhuvaṁ bhavāya . gatinidhiviyadiṁddu sa
mmitāyāṁ śakaśaradivvadiśatrilōcanasya [.] Anama
śararipōrakhaṁḍa dīpaṁ tadalika dṛksadṛśaṁ
maṁtrisōmaḥ . Ī sōmana preggaḍakoḍku maṁḍḍa
na goṁḍḍapaḍmaralōni liṁggamupāṭi yaṁddudama ta
llidaṁḍrulaku dharmmārtthamugā śrīsōmēśvaramahā
dēvaraṁ bratiṣṭiṁcci guḍimunuṁgaṭṭiṁcci dēvara
havi bali yarccanalaku nairuti bhāgamunaṁdu
kaṭṭiṁccina pedda ceṟvunicci dēvarapāguḍamu
nakuviccina vṛttulu sthānapati pinnajiyālu
kha 1 Allikūṭadēvaku na 5 valivē śrīdhara
bhaṭla kha 1 vīrimōdalu bhaṭla kha 1 dhamu
vāmadēvabhaṭla kha 1 pēruvalinārāya
ṇabhaṭla kha 1 māhēśvara Amarēśvarabhaṭla
Digital edition of SII 40.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
